title: Why Asushin is hated
wikitext:
[]: Why Asushin is hated Post by Asugran233 » Sat Feb 12, 2022 1:40 pm While watching the memes on the subreddit, I noticed hate to this ship, I am curious about this opinion why it is hated, since before 3.0 + 1.0 it was adored

[]: Re: Why Asushin is hated Post by FXArmaros98 » Sat Feb 12, 2022 3:47 pm Well still now is ship loved by fans, it also have a sub-reddit dedicated https://www.reddit.com/r/asushin/

[]: Re: Why Asushin is hated Post by Asugran233 » Sat Feb 12, 2022 4:43 pm I know but i don't understand hater who hates Asushin

[]: Re: Why Asushin is hated Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Feb 13, 2022 3:47 am As the anti-shipper, the big reason is that I see the pairing as completely dysfunctional and unsustainable, having run its course by episode 24. He needs a mommy-gf -- something for which Mari seems much better qualified, and for which there may be candidates amongst the groupies from episode 3; she needs a strong-willed high-achiever who she can respect -- and we have to look outside the available character pool for that.

[]: Re: Why Asushin is hated Post by Blockio » Mon Feb 14, 2022 12:34 pm Asugran, this is the third thread that you have created for that same purpose. Please stick to any of your previous ones instead of creating a new one each time.
